university.name: HCMC University of Foreign Languages - Information Technology (HUFLIT)

IntroductionPage.about1: Frontend Developer with Fullstack mindset. I build responsive and user-friendly interfaces using Next.js, React, and Tailwind CSS, and develop backend services with Node.js and MongoDB to support complete web applications.
IntroductionPage.about2: Currently seeking an Intern/Fresher position to gain real-world development experience.

ProjectsPage.title: Projects
ProjectsPage.description: A collection of real-world projects I've built, tracking my progress from the first lines of code to full-stack systems.

internship_management.title: University Internship Management System
internship_management.description: A comprehensive platform built to streamline the internship coordination process between Students, Faculty, and University Departments.

stack.title: Tech stack
list: Next.js 15
Shadcn UI
Node.js (Express)
MongoDB
Edge Store
JWT (HttpOnly Cookie)

features.title: Features
list: Multi-Role Workflow: Implemented Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) for Students, Instructors, Faculty Boards, and Training Departments.
Automated Allocation: Designed a logic to auto-assign supervisors to students after a 7-day grace period, ensuring no student is left unguided.
Virtual Classrooms: Enabled instructors to manage student lists, post guidelines, and grade assignments within a unified interface.
Efficient File Handling: Integrated Edge Store for seamless document uploads, including official notices and student report submissions.
Enhanced Security: Utilized custom Middlewares and HttpOnly Cookies for secure, role-specific session management.

challenges.title: Challenges
list: Adopting Modern Tech: Self-taught and implemented Next.js 15 and Shadcn UI, balancing Server and Client components for optimal performance.
Complex Business Logic: Architected a system to handle dynamic instructor quotas and student distributions based on real-time enrollment data.

learnings.title: Learnings
list: Mastered the modern Next.js ecosystem and learned how to build high-quality, accessible UIs with Shadcn UI.
Gained practical experience in cloud storage integration and hardening web security through cookie-based authentication.

cinefruit.title: CineFruit - Movie Ticket Booking App
cinefruit.description: A cross-platform mobile application for seamless movie ticket bookings, featuring real-time seat reservations and integrated digital payments.

stack.title: Tech stack
list: Flutter (Dart)
Node.js (Express)
MongoDB
Figma
JWT
MoMo/PayPal SDK

features.title: Features
list: End-to-End Design: Crafted high-fidelity UI/UX prototypes in Figma and brought them to life using Flutter.
Intuitive Booking: Browse showtimes by movie or cinema with an interactive seat selection map.
State Persistence & Holding: Implemented a 15-minute seat-holding logic that restores the booking session if the user re-opens the app within the time limit.
Add-on Services: Integrated a streamlined interface for selecting food and beverage combos during the checkout flow.
Payment & Security: Secure transaction handling via MoMo and PayPal; robust JWT authentication with email verification.

challenges.title: Challenges
list: Persistence Logic: Handling complex app states to ensure users don't lose their booking progress during interruptions.
Real-world Deployment: Navigating the process of sideloading and testing the app on physical iOS devices using AltServer/AltStore.

learnings.title: Learnings
list: Mastered the full mobile development lifecycle, from initial UI concepts in Figma to backend integration and physical device testing.
Deepened expertise in managing real-time data expiration (TTL) and handling multi-step checkout processes.

travfruit.title: TRAVFRUIT - Flight Booking System (Client & Admin)
travfruit.description: A complete flight booking ecosystem featuring two dedicated portals for travelers and admins, supporting round-trip bookings and multi-channel online payments.

stack.title: Tech stack
list: React (CRA/Vite)
Node.js (Express)
MongoDB
TanStack Query
JWT
MoMo/PayPal/VietQR SDK

features.title: Features
list: Client: Fully responsive UI for searching, filtering, and booking both one-way and round-trip flights.
Flexible Payments: Integrated MoMo, PayPal, and VietQR for a smooth and diverse checkout experience.
Admin Dashboard: Centralized management for user accounts, flight schedules, and real-time transaction tracking.
State Management: Leveraged useQuery and useMutation for optimized API calls and seamless data synchronization.
Security & Auth: Robust JWT-based authentication with role-based access control and email verification for new sign-ups.

challenges.title: Challenges
list: Team Leadership: Coordinated a team of 4, managing task delegation and ensuring consistency between the Client and Admin domains to meet project deadlines.
Complex Booking Logic: Solved the 'ghost booking' issue by implementing MongoDB TTL indexes to auto-release seats if payment isn't completed within 15 minutes.

learnings.title: Learnings
list: Gained hands-on experience in project management and team collaboration by maintaining clear API documentation via Postman.
Mastered the integration of third-party payment gateways and the deployment of complex full-stack apps on Vercel.

writing.title: AI-Powered English Learning Platform
writing.description: A Fullstack application designed to assist English learners. The platform leverages OpenAI's models to generate personalized study materials and maintain a healthy community through automated AI moderation.

stack.title: Tech stack
list: React (Vite)
TypeScript
Tailwind CSS
Node.js (Express)
MongoDB
OpenAI API
JWT (JSON Web Token)

features.title: Features
list: Secure Authentication: Built a robust login/signup system with persistent sessions using JWT.
AI Writing Assistant: Integrated gpt-4o-mini to generate tailored essays, vocabulary, and phrases based on the user's specific topic and level.
Smart Community Moderation: Implemented a real-time comment filtering system using OpenAI's moderation models to detect and block toxic or invalid content automatically.
Automated Grading: Users receive instant feedback and evaluations on their writing tasks from the AI.
Fully Responsive UI: Crafted with a mobile-first approach using Tailwind CSS for a seamless across-device experience.

challenges.title: Challenges
list: Fullstack Architecture: Managing the entire data flow from the UI to the Node.js server and MongoDB database while ensuring system stability.
AI Integration & Parsing: Engineering complex prompts and ensuring the AI responses strictly follow a specific JSON schema using zodTextFormat for consistent UI rendering.

learnings.title: Learnings
list: Adopted TypeScript for stricter type safety, significantly reducing bugs during the development process.
Deepened knowledge of backend security and session management with JWT.
Integrate AI APIs to solve real-world problems like content moderation and automated education.

grapfood.title: GrabFood UI Clone
grapfood.description: A UI-focused project mimicking the GrabFood food delivery platform. This was my very first step into the React ecosystem, where I learned how to build modern, interactive user interfaces from scratch.

stack.title: Tech stack
list: ReactJS (Create React App)
Javascript
Tailwind CSS
React Router DOM

features.title: Features
list: Fully responsive layout across Desktop, Tablet, and Mobile using Tailwind CSS.
Smooth, no-reload navigation between the Homepage, Restaurant Details, and Category pages via React Router.
Modular components like Food Cards and Search Bars designed for high reusability.
Dynamic rendering of restaurant lists and menus using mock JSON data.

challenges.title: Challenges
list: Shifting my mindset from traditional DOM manipulation to React's State and Props management for the first time.

learnings.title: Learnings
list: Gained a solid grasp of React's core mechanics, especially using Hooks like useState and useEffect to manage data and UI rendering.
Developed a self-learning workflow by diving into official documentation and troubleshooting real-world bugs during development.
Learned how to deploy and manage a live web application using GitHub Pages for real-world accessibility.

Skills&Tools.description: A breakdown of the languages, frameworks, and tools I use to build Web, Mobile, and Backend solutions.

email.min: Email must be at least 5 characters
email.max: Email must be at most 100 characters

topic.min: Topic must be at least 10 characters
topic.max: Topic must be at most 200 characters

message.min: Message must be at least 100 characters
message.max: Message must be at most 1000 characters
